title: Ctenitopsis membranifolia

intro: Ctenitopsis membranifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, commonly known as a type of fern. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Ctenitopsis membranifolia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
